welcome_sub: Your soft space for mental mapping.
empty_state: You don't have any projects yet. Create one to get started!
accept_terms: I accept the Terms and Conditions
terms_paragraph_1: 1. Connectid is a mental mapping and diagramming tool provided 'as is'. We are not responsible, legally or otherwise, for the specific use, content, or interpretations that users give to their generated maps and structures.
terms_paragraph_2: 2. Privacy Guarantee: User data, including projects, accounts, and settings, are strictly private. We do not sell, analyze, or use your data for commercial, training, or advertising purposes. Synchronization exists solely to let you securely save and access your projects from any of your devices.
verification_code_desc: We have sent a verification code to your email. Please enter it below to confirm you are not a bot.
invalid_code: The code entered is incorrect. Please try again.
error_occurred: An error occurred. Please check your credentials.
login_subtitle: Welcome back! Access your diagrams and templates.
register_subtitle: Create your account and verify it with the secure link we will send to your email.
signup_prompt: Don't have an account? Sign Up
local_mode_message: Local mode. Sign in to sync.
delete_project_confirm_desc: This cannot be undone. It will be removed from your device and the cloud.
confirm_project_id_label: Type the project ID to confirm:
notes_placeholder: Write your ideas, reminders, or documentation here...
verification_page_desc: We've sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link in your email to verify your account, then press the button below.
verification_not_verified: Your email is not verified yet. Please check your inbox or spam folder.
verification_status_error: An error occurred while checking account status.
verification_no_user: No user found. Please sign in again to resend the email.
verification_sent: Verification link has been resent to your email.
resend_too_many_requests: You've requested too many emails. Please wait a few minutes.
verify_email_first: Please verify your email before continuing.
weak_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
